# Windsurf IDE Documentation - Complete Content Extract

## Main Headings & Sections
- Welcome to Windsurf
- Set Up
- Onboarding
- Update Windsurf
- Things to Try
- Forgot to Import VS Code Configurations?
- Incompatible Extensions
- Custom App Icons (beta)
- Windsurf Next
- Uninstall Windsurf

## Core Features & Components

**Cascade**: Described as "Your agentic chatbot that can collaborate with you like never before." It functions as an AI-powered code assistant accessible via a panel on the IDE's right side.

**Key Feature Cards**:
- Usage (Credits and usage tracking)
- Terminal (Upgraded terminal experience)
- MCP (Model Context Protocol servers extending agent capabilities)
- Memories (Customizable behavior through memories and rules)
- Context Awareness (Codebase understanding)
- Advanced (Configuration options)
- Workflows (Automating repetitive development trajectories)
- App Deploys (One-click application deployment)

## Installation Requirements

**Mac**: OS X Yosemite minimum
**Windows**: Windows 10 minimum
**Ubuntu**: Ubuntu 20.04+ (glibc >= 2.31, glibcxx >= 3.4.26)
**Other Linux**: glibc >= 2.28, glibcxx >= 3.4.25

## Onboarding Steps

1. **Setup Flow Selection**: Import from VS Code/Cursor or start fresh; optional PATH installation
2. **Keybindings**: Choose VS Code or Vim bindings
3. **Theme Selection**: Default color themes available
4. **Authentication**: Windsurf account signup (free) or login required
5. **Alternative Auth**: Manual authentication code entry available if needed

## Configuration & Settings

- Import settings/extensions from VS Code or Cursor
- Settings accessible via "Windsurf - Settings" button (bottom right)
- Advanced Settings available through profile dropdown
- Command Palette access: Cmd+Shift+P (Mac) or Ctrl+Shift+P (Windows/Linux)

## Additional Features

**Custom App Icons**: Beta feature for Mac OS users; access via profile/settings icon for icon customization

**Windsurf Next**: Prerelease version enabling early access to unreleased features; available at separate download link

**Incompatible Extensions**: Cannot install other AI code completion tools or proprietary extensions; no marketplace access

## Uninstallation Process

Requires closing application, deleting application folder, removing configuration files (~/.codeium/windsurf), and cleaning up PATH variables.

## Resources

- Documentation Index: https://docs.windsurf.com/llms.txt
- Changelog available at windsurf.com/changelog
- Recommended Plugins section references additional extensions
